cards.back: A logical connective that is true only if both of its components are true
A logical connective that is true if at least one of its components is true
A logical connective that is true if the component is false and false if the component is true
| T | T | T | F | F | F | F | F | F | F | T | T | T | F |
| T | F | T | T | F | F | F | F | F | F | F | T | T | F |
